case_title: AMIN, G.S. vs. COOK, SHIRLEY et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE JOSEPH W. CHANDLER, RPTR. J. LEWIS, CLK, RCONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. A. EVJE II ATTY. FOR DEFT. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. JUDGMNT PER STIP. FILED. PLTF. TO POSS. OF PREMISES. LEASE FF. STAY TO 5/10/94 OR JUDGMNT. FOR $740.19. WV. ANY OTHER CLAIM. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN FEES.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY THERE IS A STAY UNTIL 5-10-94. IF DEFENDANT DOESN'T MOVE BY THIS DATE, SHE MUST PAY RENT AND DAMAGES OF $740.19 TO PLAINTIFF.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G.S. AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G.S. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-26-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $9.17 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G.S.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, SHIRLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 SIXTH STREET #31, STAYED UNTIL MAY-10-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, THERE IS A STAY UNTIL 5-10-94. IF DEFENDANT DOESN'T MOVE BY THIS DATE, SHE MUST PAY RENT AND DAMAGES OF $740.19 TO PLAINTIFF.
